name: Dax
description: '''Daniel Nwosu Jr.''' (born March 22, 1994), professionally known by his [[stage name]] '''Dax''' (often stylized in [[all caps]]), is a Canadian singer and rapper. He has recorded two albums, ''Pain Paints Paintings'' (2021) and ''From a Man's Perspective'' (2024). He has achieved certifications in Canada and the United States for his singles "[[Dear Alcohol]]" and "[[To Be a Man]]."
